title: RT-PCR from Yao CK et al. (2017)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fjhvk","text":"This protocol describes the RT-PCR from 'Flower Ca2+ channel in CME and ADBE' of Yao CK et al.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":50,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dvgs8","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cajn4","text":"Please see the manuscript for the full method details.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Mix 5 µg of total RNA with oligo-dT primer in 20 µl of reverse transcription reaction solution.
Use 1µl of them to amplify cDNA of ratFwe2 mRNA with specific primers (forward primer: GAAGATCTATGAGCGGCTCGGTCGCC; reverse primer: CGGAATTCTCACAGTTCCCCCTCGAATG).
Use Twenty-five PCR cycles to allow exponential PCR amplification.
Sequence the PCR products to validate the identity of ratFwe2 mRNA.
Extract total RNA of different regions of adult rat brain with TRIZOL reagent according to the manufacturer's instructions.
creator: Chi-Kuang Yao
